sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93049" key="sa/qwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάθων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάθη</foreign>, <sense id="n93049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πόσθων</ref> </xr> from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πόσθη</foreign>, a coaxing word of nurses to a boy-baby, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0510.tlg001:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telecl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
